title: Chicken Pesto Flatbread PC
ingredients: 1 each Prep Flatbread Dough PC|2 fl oz Prep Creamy Pesto Sauce|1 each Prep Roasted Chicken Breasts|3 oz Prep Chopped Artichoke Hearts|2 oz Prep Diced Roasted Red Peppers|3 oz Dairy - Cheese Mozzarella/Provolone Shredded|1 tsp Prep Chopped Parsley|1 each Prep Lemon Wedges
cook_steps: Remove dough from cooler and rub one side with flour, then place semolina on pizza peel.|Place dough on pizza peel and dock the entire dough with a docking tool.|Ladle creamy pesto sauce into center of dough and spread from center to edge, leaving approximately 1/2 inch of outer dough without sauce.|Sprinkle half of the mozzarella provolone evenly over the sauce.|Place chicken on a cutting board, rough chop, then distribute evenly over the sauce.|Place chopped peppers evenly over the sauce.|Sprinkle the rest of the mozzarella provolone evenly over the toppings.|Place pizza into a 500-degree pizza oven and cook until crust is golden brown and has a firm underside, approximately 8 minutes.|Using a pizza peel, remove pizza from oven.|Cut in half lengthwise, then make 4 even widthwise cuts to create 10 even sized square slices.
plate_steps: Slide pizza onto a rectangle plate.|Place lemon wedge in the top right corner of the plate.

title: Ginger Lime Wild Mushroom Bowl
ingredients: 10 oz Prep Cooked Rice Noodles|6 oz Prep Marinated Mushrooms|1 cup Produce - Cabbage Red Shredded|2 fl oz Prep Ginger Lime Dressing|1 fl oz Prep Unagi Sauce|2 oz Prep Pickled Vegetables|1 Tbsp Other Food - Nuts Hazelnuts|1 Tbsp Produce - Cilantro|1 Tbsp Produce - Mint
cook_steps: Place rice noodles in the microwave for 45 seconds to 1 minute.|Place rice noodles, cabbage, and dressing into a mixing bowl, then using gloved hands or tongs, toss gently ensuring all ingredients are evenly coated.
plate_steps: Place dressed noodles and cabbage in the center of a chilled large bowl, ensuring you pile it high.|Place marinated portobello in the center.|Zig zag unagi sauce evenly over everything.|Place pickled veg on top.|Place cilantro on top.|Sprinkle hazelnuts evenly over everything.|Sprinkle chopped mint over everything.

title: Crispy Coastal Shrimp Bowl
ingredients: 12 oz Prep Sushi Rice|2 oz Prep Pickled Vegetables|2 fl oz Prep Unagi Sauce|1 Tbsp Other Food - Spice Sesame Seed Black|0.2 oz Prep Chopped Cilantro|3 fl oz Prep Sriracha Aioli|12 each Prep Breaded Shrimp FS|1 Tbsp Other Food - Pickled Ginger
cook_steps: Place breaded shrimp in a 350-degree preheated deep fryer and cook for 2 1/2 minutes or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees and the outside is golden brown.|While shrimp is cooking, place rice in the microwave for one minute.|Toss fried shrimp in 2 fl oz sriracha aioli, ensuring all shrimp are coated.
plate_steps: Place heated rice in the center of a large round bowl, piling as high as possible.|Zig Zag Unagi sauce evenly over the rice.|Zig Zag Sriracha aioli evenly over the rice.|Place Shrimp at 9 o'clock.|Place Ginger at 6 o'clock.|Place Pickled veg at 12 o'clock.|Place cilantro in the center of the bowl.|Sprinkle sesame seeds evenly over all ingredients.

title: Ahi Poke Bowl
ingredients: 12 oz Prep Sushi Rice|2 fl oz Prep Unagi Sauce|2 fl oz Prep Ginger Lime Dressing|1 Tbsp Other Food - Pickled Ginger|2 oz Prep Pickled Vegetables|0.2 oz Produce - Cilantro|1 Tbsp Other Food - Spice Sesame Seed Black|5 oz Seafood - Ahi Poke|1 fl oz Prep Sriracha Aioli
cook_steps: Place ahi and dressing into a mixing bowl, then using gloved hands, toss gently ensuring all pieces are evenly coated.
plate_steps: Place rice in a microwave for 1 minute, then place in the center of a large round bowl piling as high as possible.|Zig Zag Unagi sauce evenly over the rice.|Zig Zag Sriracha aioli evenly over the rice.|Place Ahi at 9 o'clock.|Place Ginger at 6 o'clock.|Place Pickled veg at 12 o'clock.|Place cilantro in the center of the bowl.|Sprinkle sesame seeds evenly over all ingredients.

title: Beer Sausage Flatbread PC
ingredients: 1 each Prep Flatbread Dough PC|2 oz Dairy - Cheese Ricotta|1 oz Produce - Tomato Roasted Marinated|2 Tbsp Dairy - Cheese Parmesan Shredded|2 fl oz Prep Flatbread Red Sauce|3 oz Prep Beer Sausage|1 1/2 oz Prep Roasted Mushrooms|1 tsp Prep Chopped Parsley
cook_steps: Remove dough from cooler and stretch to approximately 12 x 6 inches.|Rub one side with flour, then place semolina on pizza peel.|Place dough on pizza peel and dock the entire dough with a docking tool.|Ladle pizza sauce into center of dough and spread from center to edge, leaving approximately 1/2 inch of outer dough without sauce.|Sprinkle beer sausage evenly over sauce.|Place ricotta in approximately 1/4-ounce portions evenly over the dough.|Place roasted tomatoes evenly over the sauce.|Place roasted mushrooms evenly over the sauce.|Sprinkle parmesan cheese evenly over all ingredients.|Place pizza into a 500-degree pizza oven and cook until crust is golden brown and has a firm underside, approximately 8 minutes.|Using a pizza peel, remove pizza from oven, then sprinkle herbs over the pizza.|Cut in half lengthwise, then make 4 even widthwise cuts to create 10 even sized square slices.
plate_steps: Slide pizza onto a rectangle plate.

title: Caprese Flatbread PC
ingredients: 1 each Prep Flatbread Dough PC|2 fl oz Prep Flatbread Red Sauce|2 oz Produce - Tomato Roasted Marinated|1 oz Prep Roasted Garlic|2 oz Dairy - Cheese Ricotta|2 Tbsp Other Food - Sauce Pesto Basil|1/2 oz Produce - Spinach Baby|1 Tbsp Other Food - Balsamic Fig Glaze|1 oz Dairy - Cheese Parmesan Shredded
cook_steps: Remove dough from cooler and stretch to approximately 12 x 6 inches.|Rub one side with flour, then place semolina on pizza peel.|Place dough on pizza peel and dock the entire dough with a docking tool.|Ladle pizza sauce into center of dough and spread from center to edge, leaving approximately 3/4 inch of outer dough without sauce.|Sprinkle half the parmesan evenly over the sauce.|Place roasted garlic evenly over the dough.|Place spinach evenly over the dough.|Place ricotta in approximately 1/4-ounce portions evenly over the dough.|Place roasted tomatoes evenly over the dough.|Sprinkle parmesan cheese evenly over all ingredients.|Place pizza into a 500-degree pizza oven and cook until crust is golden brown and has a firm underside, approximately 8 minutes.|Using a pizza peel, remove pizza from oven.|Cut in half lengthwise, then make 4 even widthwise cuts to create 10 even sized square slices.|Drizzle pesto over the entire flatbread.|Drizzle balsamic fig glaze over the entire flatbread.
plate_steps: Slide pizza onto a rectangle plate.

title: Bacon Brie Flatbread PC
ingredients: 1 each Prep Flatbread Dough PC|1 1/2 oz Dairy - Cheese Mozzarella/Provolone Shredded|1 Tbsp Other Food - Nuts Hazelnuts|1 Tbsp Other Food - Honey Bulk|2 oz Prep Bacon Bits|2 fl oz Prep Flatbread Pink Sauce|1 1/2 oz Dairy - Cheese Brie Spreadable
cook_steps: Remove dough from cooler and stretch to approximately 12 x 6 inches.|Rub one side with flour, then place semolina on pizza peel.|Place dough on pizza peel and dock the entire dough with a docking tool.|Ladle pink sauce into center of dough and spread from center to edge, leaving approximately 1/2 inch of outer dough without sauce.|Sprinkle mozzarella evenly over sauce.|Place brie in approximately 1-inch pieces evenly over the mozzarella.|Sprinkle bacon bits evenly over the cheeses.|Place pizza into a 500-degree pizza oven and cook until crust is golden brown and has a firm underside, approximately 8 minutes.|Using a pizza peel, remove pizza from oven, then sprinkle hazelnuts and drizzle honey over the pizza.|Cut in half lengthwise, then make 4 even widthwise cuts to create 10 even sized square slices.
plate_steps: Slide pizza onto a rectangle plate.

title: Tri Tip Flatbread PC
ingredients: 2 oz Other Food - Sauce Alfredo|8 each Produce - Tomato Roasted Marinated|3 oz Dairy - Cheese Mozzarella/Provolone Shredded|1 each Prep Flatbread Dough PC|1 oz Prep Sliced Red Onion|1 tsp Prep Chopped Parsley|4 oz Prep Sliced Tri Tip
cook_steps: Remove dough from cooler and stretch to approximately 12 x 6 inches.|Rub one side with flour, then place semolina on pizza peel.|Place dough on pizza peel and dock the entire dough with a docking tool.|Ladle alfredo sauce into center of dough and spread from center to edge, leaving approximately 1/2 inch of outer dough without sauce.|Place tri-tip on a cutting board, rough chop, then distribute evenly over the sauce.|Place roasted tomatoes evenly over the sauce.|Place onion evenly over the sauce.|Sprinkle mozzarella evenly over the toppings.|Place pizza into a 500-degree pizza oven and cook until crust is golden brown and has a firm underside, approximately 8 minutes.|Using a pizza peel, remove pizza from oven, then sprinkle herbs evenly over the pizza.|Cut in half lengthwise, then make 4 even widthwise cuts to create 10 even sized square slices.
plate_steps: Slide pizza onto a rectangle plate.

title: Cheese Flatbread PC
ingredients: 1 each Prep Flatbread Dough PC|3 oz Dairy - Cheese Mozzarella/Provolone Shredded|1 Tbsp Prep Chopped Parsley|2 fl oz Prep Flatbread Red Sauce
cook_steps: Remove dough from cooler and rub one side with flour, then place semolina on pizza peel.|Place dough on pizza peel and dock the entire dough with a docking tool.|Ladle pizza sauce into center of dough and spread from center to edge, leaving approximately 1/2 inch of outer dough without sauce.|Sprinkle mozzarella provolone mix evenly over the sauce.|Place pizza into a 500-degree pizza oven and cook until crust is golden brown and has a firm underside, approximately 8 minutes.|Using a pizza peel, remove pizza from oven, then sprinkle parsley over the pizza.|Cut in half lengthwise, then make 4 even widthwise cuts to create 10 even sized square slices.
plate_steps: Slide pizza onto a rectangle plate.

title: Wild Mushroom Flatbread PC
ingredients: 1 each Prep Flatbread Dough PC|3 fl oz Other Food - Sauce Alfredo|2 oz Dairy - Cheese Mozzarella/Provolone Shredded|1 oz Dairy - Cheese Parmesan Shredded|4 oz Prep Roasted Mushrooms|1 tsp Prep Chopped Parsley
cook_steps: Remove dough from cooler and rub one side with flour, then place semolina on pizza peel.|Place dough on pizza peel and dock the entire dough with a docking tool.|Ladle alfredo sauce into center of dough and spread from center to edge, leaving approximately 1/2 inch of outer dough without sauce.|Sprinkle mozzarella evenly over the sauce.|Place mushrooms evenly over the cheese.|Sprinkle parmesan evenly over the toppings.|Place pizza into a 500-degree pizza oven and cook until crust is golden brown and has a firm underside, approximately 8 minutes.|Using a pizza peel, remove pizza from oven, then sprinkle herbs evenly over the pizza.|Cut in half lengthwise, then make 4 even widthwise cuts to create 10 even sized square slices.
plate_steps: Slide pizza onto a rectangle plate.

title: Caesar Salad
ingredients: 2 Tbsp Dairy - Cheese Parmesan Shredded|1/2 cup Prep Croutons|2 fl oz Prep Caesar Dressing|6 oz Prep Chopped Romaine
cook_steps: Place romaine and dressing into a mixing bowl, then using gloved hands or tongs, toss lettuce gently ensuring all leaves are evenly coated.
plate_steps: Place dressed lettuce in the center of a chilled large round plate, ensuring you pile it high.|Place croutons evenly over the entire salad.|Sprinkle parmesan cheese over entire salad.

title: House Salad
ingredients: 3 oz Produce - Lettuce Arcadia|2 Tbsp Dairy - Cheese Parmesan Shredded|2 Tbsp Other Food - Nuts Almonds Sliced|2 fl oz Other Food - Dressing Blackberry|2 Tbsp Prep Kiwanda Craisins
cook_steps: Place lettuce in the center of a chilled large round plate, piling as high as possible.|Sprinkle craisins over the top of the salad.|Sprinkle almonds over the top of the salad.|Sprinkle cheese over the top of the salad.
plate_steps: Place a ramekin of desired dressing at 3 o'clock.

title: Chocolate Chip Brownie PC
ingredients: 1 each Prep Chocolate Chip Brownie|3 oz Dairy - Ice Cream Vanilla|1 fl oz Prep Stout Chocolate Sauce
cook_steps: Place a brownie into a microwave and heat for 45 seconds.
plate_steps: Place ice cream scoop in the center of the brownie.|Zig Zag chocolate sauce over ice cream and brownie.

title: Key Lime Pie
ingredients: 1 each Prep Key Lime Pie Baking|1 oz Dairy - Whipped Cream|1/4 each Produce - Limes Fresh
plate_steps: Remove key lime pie from reach-in and place whipped cream in the center of the pie.|Place lime wheel on top of the whipped cream.|Place lime zest over the entire dish.

title: Marionberry Buckle
ingredients: 1 each Prep Marionberry Buckle Baking|3 oz Dairy - Ice Cream Vanilla
cook_steps: Place buckle in microwave and cook for 30 seconds.
plate_steps: Scoop ice cream and place in the center of the crisp.

title: Adult Mac n Cheese
ingredients: 1/2 oz Dairy - Cheese Cheddar Shredded|8 oz Prep Cooked Cavatappi|6 fl oz Prep Cheese Sauce
cook_steps: Place pasta in a microwavable container and microwave for 45 seconds.|Add heated pasta to a saute pan over medium heat, then add cheese sauce, toss well to incorporate, and melt cheese.
plate_steps: Place mac n cheese into a large bowl.|Sprinkle 1/2 oz of cheddar cheese on top of pasta.

title: Pale Malt Salmon
ingredients: 2 fl oz Other Food - Oil Blend|2 Tbsp Prep Pale Malt Breading|8 oz Prep Garlic Mashed Potatoes|2 fl oz Prep Piccata Sauce|1 tsp Prep Chopped Dill|1/2 tsp Prep Chopped Parsley|to taste Prep Salt & Pepper Mix|4 oz Prep Blanched Broccolini|1 each Meat - Seafood Salmon Portion
cook_steps: Remove salmon from the cooler and season with salt & pepper, then press flesh side into a pan of pale malt breading ensuring it covers the entire flesh side.|Place oil on a flat top and allow to heat, then add salmon flesh side down and cook for 3 minutes, then flip and cook skin side until internal temperature reaches 135 degrees.|While fish is cooking, place 6-8 spears of broccolini with oil, salt and pepper on the flat top and cook until hot.|Place piccata sauce and chopped dill into a saute pan and cook until heated through.
plate_steps: Scoop potatoes into center of the plate.|Place broccolini on the left of the potatoes from 11 o'clock to 7 o'clock.|Lay salmon flesh side up on top of the potatoes from 7 o'clock to 3 o'clock.|Ladle sauce around the potatoes and broccolini from 7 o'clock to 3 o'clock.|Sprinkle chopped parsley on top of fish.

title: Steamer Clams
plateware: Large Round Bowl on Oval Plate
ingredients: 1 lb Meat - Seafood Clams Little Neck|4 fl oz Beer Steamer Liquid|1 Tbsp Prep Garlic Butter|1 Tbsp Prep Onion Chopped Yellow|1 Tbsp Other Food - Oil Blend 80/20|1 each Prep Lemon Wedge|1 each Produce - Parsley Flat|2 each Prep Crostinis
cook_steps: Place oil in a saute pan and heat over medium heat, add onions and garlic butter, and cook until translucent.|Add clams and beer liquid to pan, cover with lid and cook until all clams have opened. Discard any unopened clams.|Sprinkle fresh herbs over all ingredients.
plate_steps: Place all ingredients into a large round bowl.|Place 2 crostinis at 9 o'clock.|Place lemon wedge at 3 o'clock.|Place bowl on a large oval plate.

title: Reuben Sandwich
ingredients: 2 each Bread - Rye Loaf Slice|5 oz Prep Sliced Corned Beef|2 each Prep Sliced Swiss Cheese|2 fl oz Prep Russian Dressing|3 oz Prep Bacon Beer Sauerkraut|6 oz Cooked Fry Yield|3 Tbsp Dairy - Butter Bulk Unsalted
cook_steps: Place Rye bread slices on a 350-degree flat top and place Swiss cheese on each slice.|Place Russian dressing evenly on each slice of bread.|While bread is toasting, place corned beef on the flat top and move around through the cooking process to ensure all gets hot.|Place sauerkraut on flat top, squirt with beer, and cook until hot.|While sandwich is cooking, place fries in a 350-degree preheated deep fryer and cook for 2 1/2 minutes.|Transfer corned beef to one piece of rye, then top with sauerkraut, then place other piece of rye on top.|Cut Reuben in half diagonally.
plate_steps: Place sandwich at 3 o'clock on the plate.|Place fries at 9 o'clock.|Place ramekin of ketchup in the center of the plate.

title: Smoked Tri Tip Sandwich
ingredients: 1 each Bread - Telera Roll|6 oz Cooked Fry Yield|1 oz Prep Fried Onions|1 fl oz Prep Sea n Red Bobby-Q Sauce|1 fl oz Prep Horseradish Mayonnaise|5 oz Prep Sliced Tri Tip|3 Tbsp Dairy - Butter Bulk Unsalted|1 oz Prep Sliced Cheddar Cheese
cook_steps: Place sliced tri tip on a flat top and season with salt & pepper. Move the meat around through the cooking process to ensure all gets hot.|Add cheddar cheese to the top of the meat and allow to melt.|While meat is cooking, butter the top and bottom of a roll and place on the flat top, warm until golden brown.|While meat is cooking, place fries into a preheated 350-degree deep fryer and cook for 2 1/2 minutes.|Place horseradish mayo on bottom bun ensuring it covers the entire surface.|Place meat on bottom bun, then top with BBQ sauce.|Place crispy onions on top of BBQ sauce and place top bun on crispy onions.
plate_steps: Place sandwich at 3 o'clock on the plate with a straight pick in the top. If there is a special request, place 2 picks into the top of the sandwich.|Place fries at 9 o'clock.|Place ramekin of ketchup in the center of the plate.

title: Kid's Marinara Pasta
ingredients: 1 Tbsp Dairy - Cheese Parmesan Shredded|6 oz Prep Cooked Cavatappi|3 fl oz Prep Flatbread Red Sauce
cook_steps: Place pasta in a microwavable container and microwave for 45 seconds.|Add heated pasta to a saute pan over medium heat, then add marinara and toss well to incorporate.
plate_steps: Place pasta into a small bowl.|Sprinkle parmesan cheese on top of pasta.

title: Kid's Mac n Cheese
ingredients: 1/2 oz Dairy - Cheese Cheddar Shredded|6 oz Prep Cooked Cavatappi|3 fl oz Prep Cheese Sauce
cook_steps: Place pasta into a pasta basket, then cook in 200-degree water for 1 minute.|Add heated pasta to a saute pan over medium heat, then add cheese sauce, toss well to incorporate, and melt cheese.
plate_steps: Place mac n cheese into a small bowl.|Sprinkle 1/2 oz of cheddar cheese on top of pasta.

title: Kid's Buttered Pasta
ingredients: 1 oz Dairy - Butter Bulk Unsalted|1 Tbsp Dairy - Cheese Parmesan Shredded|6 oz Prep Cooked Cavatappi
cook_steps: Place pasta into a pasta basket, then cook in 200-degree water for 1 minute.|Add heated pasta to a saute pan over medium heat, then add butter and toss well to incorporate.
plate_steps: Place buttered pasta into a small bowl.|Sprinkle parmesan on top of pasta.

title: Kid's Grilled Cheese
ingredients: 2 each Bread - Sourdough Loaf Slice|1 1/2 oz Dairy - Cheese Cheddar Sliced
cook_steps: Place sourdough bread slices on a 350-degree flat top and place Cheddar cheese on each slice of bread.|While sandwich is cooking, place fries in a 350-degree preheated deep fryer and cook for 2 1/2 minutes.|Place the other piece of sourdough on top and cook until cheese is fully melted.|Cut in half diagonally.
plate_steps: Place sandwich at 12 o'clock on the plate.|Place fries at 6 o'clock.|Place ramekin of ketchup at 3 o'clock.
